log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Verdan — Winged Striker (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Verdan — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
REASONING: Finger of Death on Verdan — Winged Striker. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Verdan — Winged Striker.
→ Verdan — Winged Striker: CON save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 20] FAIL! 26 necrotic damage. HP: 41/67
--- Verdan — Winged Striker --- HP: 41/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:3+9=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Verdan — Winged Striker --- HP: 41/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 130/135
══ ROUND 4 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Verdan — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.

══ ROUND 5 ══
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Verdan — Winged Striker: FAIL! 22 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
